title: Remove unused VolumeList* structs
body:
[NO TESTS NEEDED] since we are just removing unused code.

Replaces: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9558

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Swagger tests are angry - I think we need to tell swagger that the volume endpoints return a define.InspectVolumeData
